behavior_summary: DESKEW::look: When the desk item is examined (U8P_DESKEW::look event), the script prepares item info/exclude state and causes the item to 'bark' the short literal string "desk ", i.e., present its label/description to the viewer, then returns/suspends.

DESKEW::use: When the desk item is used, the script reads the item's status word and tests bit 0x0100. If that bit is set the script opens a specific UI/gump (id 0x0D) for the item; if the bit is not set the script closes the item's gump. The use handler also performs the same info/exclude preparation as U8P_DESKEW::look.
notable_control_flow: DESKEW::look is an event-driven handler (process form) triggered by the 'U8P_DESKEW::look' event; it makes a single external call (Item::bark) and then completes.
DESKEW::use branches based on a bit-test: read Item::getStatus() into a local ([BP-02h]) and test bit 0x0100 to decide between calling Item::openGump(gumpId=0x0D) or Item::closeGump().
open_questions: Exact semantic meaning of the 0x0100 bit in the item's status word (inferred to represent 'gump open state' or similar) — appears likely but not explicitly named.
Precise effects of the 'info/exclude' setup sequence (pushes of 0208h/0207h) performed at the start of handlers — inferred as preparatory UI/info state but not concretely defined.
Whether DESKEW::use is directly invoked by player 'use' actions only, or also by other scripted triggers (inferred from pattern but not proven).

main_function.name: U8P_DESKEW::look
main_function.purpose: Present the desk item's short descriptive label to the viewer when examined and set up per-item info/exclude state before returning.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_DESKEW::look) — invoked when a player or actor examines/looks at the desk item

function_map.name: U8P_DESKEW::look
function_map.role: Handle 'U8P_DESKEW::look' (examine) event for the desk item: set up info/exclude state and call Item::bark with "desk ".

function_map.name: U8P_DESKEW::use
function_map.role: Handle 'use' event for the desk item: test status bit 0x0100 and open/close the item's gump (id 0x0D) accordingly.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: External API to emit/display a short text string associated with an item (used for labels/messages).

function_map.name: Item::getStatus
function_map.role: External API returning the item's status flags/word used for bit testing.

function_map.name: Item::openGump
function_map.role: External API to open a gump/UI for an item given a gump id.

function_map.name: Item::closeGump
function_map.role: External API to close an item's gump/UI.

external_calls.purpose: Make the desk item emit/display the literal label "desk " to the examining actor/viewer.
Retrieve the item's status word so the script can test bit 0x0100 to decide UI state.
Open the item's gump/UI with gump id 0x0D when the status bit 0x0100 is set.
Close the item's gump/UI when the status bit 0x0100 is not set.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: DESKEW::look: When the desk item is examined (U8P_DESKEW::look event), the script prepares item info/exclude state and causes the item to 'bark' the short literal string "desk ", i.e., present its label/description to the viewer, then returns/suspends.
